final_answer:
Finished: validator-add is now native-message driven in `x/stake`, and bridge-driven validator-join ingestion is disabled.

Why this matters: validator admission is no longer applied from bridge event forwarding, so the add-validator path now runs from native stake tx handling instead of root-chain join events.

What I changed:
1. `ValidatorJoin` execution no longer uses bridge event metadata (`tx_hash/log_index/block_number`) and no longer writes join event sequences in [msg_server.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/keeper/msg_server.go).
2. Bridge processor now skips `sendValidatorJoinToGiltConsensus` broadcasting and logs that validator admission is native-only in [stake.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/bridge/processor/stake.go).
3. Stake CLI `validator-join` now builds native join tx directly from proposer/id/activation/amount/pubkey (no receipt/event decode path) in [tx.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/client/cli/tx.go).
4. Updated join-related tests and msg constructors in [msg.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/types/msg.go), [msg_server_test.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/keeper/msg_server_test.go), [msg_test.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/types/msg_test.go), and [side_msg_server_test.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/keeper/side_msg_server_test.go).

Checks run (all pass):
- `go test ./x/stake/...`
- `go test ./bridge/processor -run '^$'`
- `go test ./app -run '^$'`

Next step:
1. If you want strict hard-cut (not compatibility) at protobuf schema level, I’ll remove legacy join metadata fields from `MsgValidatorJoin` and complete a deterministic proto-regeneration pass end-to-end.
